items.title: To the 4th: #Magic 81, Celtics 71
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
To the 4th: #Magic 81, Celtics 71

Orlando pieced together a strong third quarter, outscoring Boston 36-23 in the 10-minute frame.

Will Baker leads with 15 points, Malik Reneau has 14, Au’Diese Toney 12 and Johnell Davis with 8.

Orlando shot 13 for 18 in the third quarter.

items.title: I can't believe Josh Kerr actually took down the world record in the mile. 3:42.6 breaks my brain
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt:
I can't believe Josh Kerr actually took down the world record in the mile. 3:42.6 breaks my brain

Legit thought there was a chance we'd never see the old record fall in my lifetime.

Incredible performance sheesh

items.title: IDEA: Third-place playoff to be held immediately after the final. Everyone filing out the stadium as the game kicks off, people packing away during the first half, only sound in the stadium is the hoover being run round the terraces. Could do it in a pub car park.

#Magic trail the Celtics 48-45 at the half in Las Vegas.

Will Baker leads Orlando with 13 points and 5 rebounds. Keon Johnson and Au’Diese Toney with 7 points apiece and Lester Quinones has 6.

Meanwhile, Magic rookie Izaiyah Nelson is supporting his teammates on Instagram:

items.title: In their 5th and final Summer League game, the #Magic are without Jase Richardson, Noah Penda, Alex Morales and Colin Castleton vs. Boston. All have played plenty in Las Vegas.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
In their 5th and final Summer League game, the #Magic are without Jase Richardson, Noah Penda, Alex Morales and Colin Castleton vs. Boston. All have played plenty in Las Vegas.

Orlando started TyTy Washington Jr., Lester Quinones, Philip Wheeler, Keon Johnson and Will Baker.

items.title: Brandon was making so much great progress with his campaign and has been standing up for the right things. I’ve been so impressed by his leadership and courage through it all.
items.author: Conor Bergin
items.body_excerpt:
Brandon was making so much great progress with his campaign and has been standing up for the right things. I’ve been so impressed by his leadership and courage through it all.

This development sucks but I know it’s not the end of his story.
